title: Helpdesk API (.NET)
shortDescription: Helpdesk ticket system built with Modular Monolith, Clean Architecture, EF Core, and PostgreSQL.
description: Helpdesk domain built in C# .NET 10 as a Modular Monolith. Implements a ticket state machine (Open → In Progress → Resolved / Cancelled) with role-based access control, SLA deadline tracking, domain events, and structured logging. Refresh token rotation with Argon2id and family invalidation. Auth audit events. 193 tests: 59 unit, 128 integration (TestContainers + real PostgreSQL), 6 architecture. API documentation via Scalar.

architecture.summary: Modular Monolith with Clean Architecture per module. Four modules: Tickets (core domain), Identity (auth + sessions), SLA (deadline engine + scoring), Notifications (contracts). Domain layer has zero infrastructure dependencies. State transitions enforced at domain layer only. Use Cases injected directly via DI — no Mediator, no command bus.
architecture.diagram:
graph TD
  API[Helpdesk.API] --> TKT[Tickets Module]
  API --> IDN[Identity Module]
  API --> SLA[SLA Module]
  API --> NTF[Notifications Module]
  TKT --> SHR[Helpdesk.Shared]
  IDN --> SHR
  SLA --> SHR
  NTF --> SHR
  TKT --> DOM_T[Domain]
  TKT --> APP_T[Application / Use Cases]
  TKT --> INF_T[Infrastructure]
  INF_T --> DB[(PostgreSQL)]

title: Helpdesk API (NestJS)
shortDescription: Same helpdesk domain reimplemented in TypeScript using NestJS, Fastify, Prisma, and EventEmitter2.
description: TypeScript implementation of the helpdesk domain on NestJS + Fastify. Uses Prisma as ORM, EventEmitter2 for domain events (dispatched after persistence), and Vitest + TestContainers for integration tests against a real PostgreSQL instance. 248 tests covering the full feature set: tickets, SLA, audit events, attachments, and auth with JWT rotation and Argon2id. Feature-complete with the .NET version.

architecture.summary: Modular NestJS structure with dedicated modules per domain area. Use Cases injected directly via DI — no Mediator, no command bus. Domain logic isolated from the framework. EventEmitter2 dispatches events synchronously after persistence.
architecture.diagram:
graph TD
  API[Fastify / NestJS] --> MOD[Domain Modules]
  MOD --> DOM[Domain Layer]
  MOD --> PRI[Prisma ORM]
  PRI --> DB[(PostgreSQL)]
  MOD --> EVT[EventEmitter2]
  EVT --> HND[Event Listeners]

title: Helpdesk API (Java)
shortDescription: Java implementation with Spring Boot, JPA, and JUnit 5 test coverage.
description: Java implementation of the helpdesk domain using Spring Boot 3 and Spring Data JPA. Applies the same architectural decisions — Clean Architecture, spec-first domain invariants, role-based authorization — in a strongly-typed enterprise stack.

architecture.summary: Layered architecture following Spring Boot conventions. Repository pattern via Spring Data JPA. Domain invariants enforced in the service layer. JUnit 5 for all business rule coverage.
architecture.diagram:
graph TD
  CTL[Controllers] --> SVC[Service Layer]
  SVC --> DOM[Domain]
  SVC --> REP[Repository]
  REP --> DB[(PostgreSQL)]
